title: LibGDX Phase 4: Input Handling
description: Create InputHandler with WASD movement, Enter confirm, ESC pause, I inventory, Tab next. Implement InputMode enum (MOVEMENT, MENU, INVENTORY). Integrate InputMultiplexer in LibGdxGameScreen. Connect to GameService commands.

title: LibGDX Phase 1: Base Infrastructure
description: Set up LibGDX window, SpriteBatch, AssetManager. Create GameAssetManager, LibGdxGameScreen, update lwjgl3 launcher. Target: 1920x1080, 32x32 tiles, pixel art graphics with Nearest-Neighbor filtering.

title: LibGDX Phase 2: Dungeon & Actor Rendering
description: Implement DungeonRenderer and ActorRenderer. Render tiles, enemies, player. Implement CameraController with player tracking and map boundaries. Support fog of war with alpha masking.

title: LibGDX Phase 6: Animations & Effects
description: Create AnimationManager for spritesheet animations. Implement ParticleSystem for damage effects, death smoke, item pickup sparkles. Add smooth character movement between tiles (linear interpolation). Optional: can be deferred.

title: LibGDX Phase 8: Remove Lanterna
description: Delete presentation_lanterna package. Remove Lanterna dependency from build.gradle. Delete MainRenderer, TurnRenderer, ActorsRenderer, ColorScheme. Update Main/FirstScreen to launch LibGdxGameScreen. Full integration test.

title: LibGDX Phase 7: Save/Load Integration
description: Integrate SaveService into LibGDX screens. Implement Save in PauseScreen (calls SaveService.save). Implement Load in MenuScreen. Add hot keys: Ctrl+S quick save, Ctrl+L quick load. Show confirmation UI.

title: LibGDX Phase 3: Minimal UI HUD
description: Create UIPanel, HUDRenderer showing HP/level/logs. Implement InventoryPanel (left/right side). Create ActionLogger with color-coded events (combat=red, loot=yellow). Max 5 action lines.

title: LibGDX Phase 5: Menus & Game States
description: Implement MenuScreen (Start/Settings/Exit), PauseScreen (Resume/Save/Load/Quit), SettingsScreen (Windowed/Fullscreen toggle), GameOverScreen (Win/Lose with stats). WASD navigation, Enter selection.
